Off Calendar Aug-08-2013 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion To Vacate Dismissal
Off Calendar Aug-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: MICHAEL YOUNESSIAN, PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER.
AMANDA EBEY, ESQ., 415.989.8070, FOR DEFENDANT PAUL NOUNOU.

RULING: NO ARGUMENT. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL YOUNESSIAN'S Motion To Vacate Dismissal WILL be heard in Department 206 before Judge Lee on Thursday, August 8, 2013 at 9:30 am. The court will not provide a court reporter for this hearing. If any party wishes a reporter, the parties must meet and confer and agree on a single reporter. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR6185.
